title: desmodium axillare var. obtusifoliolum
intro: Desmodium axillare var. obtusifoliolum, also known as the climbing bean or sticktight desmodium, is a perennial plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and polyphenols. The health benefits of Desmodium axillare var. obtusifoliolum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
